markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss a Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) research proposal for GrowthX to better understand customer motivations and improve team alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing high demand but wants to distill intuition into a framework for team use](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The proposed JTBD research aims to pinpoint why customers choose GrowthX and create unified messaging](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Current project scope and pricing ($20k) may need adjustment to align with GrowthX's budget expectations (\~$10k)](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Potential for JTBD expertise to become an ongoing role within GrowthX's service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Situation

  - [Experiencing high demand with a full pipeline and ease of closing clients](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Recently raised $12.5 million in funding from Madrona Venture Group](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Team of 50 people, including 4 programmers, with plans to grow to 10 programmers by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Mixture of clients: some with ample budgets, others at seed-stage level](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Current challenge is managing bandwidth and capacity, not lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### JTBD Research Proposal

  - [6-week project to understand core customer motivations for choosing GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Deliverables include buyer motivation clarity, job segments, unified messaging, and interview materials](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Process involves screening, interviews, analysis, and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Potential for additional phases: churn analysis and sales team training](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Value and Implementation

  - [Aims to create a framework for distilling customer insights beyond intuition](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Could help tailor product positioning, accelerate growth, and strengthen market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Potential to streamline internal alignment across marketing, sales, and product teams](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [May be incorporated into GrowthX's strategy phase for client engagements](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

### Budget and Scope Considerations

  - [Initial proposal at $20k seen as high by GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Discussion around potentially reducing scope to align with \~$10k budget expectation](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Suggestion to workshop different options or adjust the package](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Future Opportunities

  - [Potential for JTBD expertise to become a horizontal role within GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Could be offered as an additional service to clients during their strategy phase](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Opportunity to differentiate GrowthX's approach from traditional marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to discuss the proposal with Marcel, Brigitte, and Jason](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [George to consider adjusting the scope and budget to better align with GrowthX's expectations](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion once internal feedback is gathered](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Explore the potential for incorporating JTBD methodology into GrowthX's service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xSLGcsSDxfKbsYbNxMn5G5e-6XeNGxQ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
